nasb.text: And He said to her, “Daughter, your faith has made you well; go in peace and be healed of your affliction.”

esv.text: And he said to her, “Daughter, your faith has made you well; go in peace, and be healed of your disease.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對她說：“女兒，你的信使你痊愈了，平安地回去吧，你的病已經好了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“女儿，你的信心救了你。安心地回去吧！你的病好了。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对她说：“女儿，你的信救了你，平平安安地去吧。你从病痛中痊愈了吧！”
